MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Oct-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. CHRIS HAN, Esq. of Han LLP (tel: 213-210-9288) for Plaintiffs (via Zoom videoconference.
Atty. JANE KEARL, Esq. of Watt, Tieder, Hoffar & Fitzgerald, L.L.P. (tel: 949-852-6700) for Defendants CP VERTICAL DEVELOPMENT CO. 1, LLC; CP DEVELOPMENT CO., LLC; THE SHIPYARD COMMUNITIES, LLC; FIVE POINT HOLDINGS, LLC.
Atty. JOSEPH FRARESSO, Esq. and Atty. ROBERT BUNZEL, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Bartko LLP (tel: 415-956-1900) for Defendants 3G FUND CP MANAGEMENT, LLC; 3G FUND CP, LLC; and GOLDEN STATE RENAISSANCE VENTURES, LLC.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CP VERTICAL DEVELOPMENT CO. 1, LLC, CP DEVELOPMENT CO., LLC, THE SHIPYARD COMMUNITIES, LLC, AND FIVE POINT HOLDINGS, LLC's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order granting defendant's Motion to Compel Arbitration and To Stay Litigation (see signed order for complete ruling.)*****

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Michelle Cooper, CSR# 13572 (tel: 562-279-5792 / email: mgraciano@elitesteno.com).
